title: Reset context at 70% capacity — compact or new session
description: When context usage approaches 70%, use /compact or start new session. Handoff via handoff/latest.md. Prevents degraded output from context anxiety.
proposed_text: - When context nears 70% capacity, proactively /compact or start a fresh session — degraded context produces hallucinations and forgotten instructions. Write handoff before resetting

title: Audit harness coherence after batch rule changes
description: After harvest apply or batch rule changes, scan .claude/rules/*.md for contradictions. Report conflicts. Prevents rules from fighting each other.
proposed_text: New script: scripts/audit-coherence.sh — scan rules for contradictions after batch changes

title: Failure mode tuning — add counterexamples on fitness filter misjudgment
description: When fitness filter produces incorrect verdict (false positive or false negative), add specific counterexample to fitness-filter/examples/good-output.md.
proposed_text: Update fitness-filter examples with counterexamples from misjudgments
